# Advanced R - Foundations

1. [Names and Values](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/names-values.html)
2. [Vectors](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/vectors.html)
3. [Subsetting](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/subsetting.html)
4. [Control Flow](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/control-flow.html)
5. [Functions](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/functions.html)
6. [Environments](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/environments.html)
7. [Conditions](presentations/AdvancedR/Foundations/conditions.html)

# Advanced R - Special Topics

1. [Functionals](presentations/AdvancedR/SpecialTopics/functionals.html)
2. [Function Factories](presentations/AdvancedR/SpecialTopics/function-factories.html)
3. [Function Operators](presentations/AdvancedR/SpecialTopics/function-operators.html)
4. [Object-Oriented Programming](presentations/AdvancedR/SpecialTopics/object-oriented-programming.html)
5. [Meta-Programming](presentations/AdvancedR/SpecialTopics/meta-programming.html)
6. [Performance](presentations/AdvancedR/SpecialTopics/performance.html)
